name: arctera-compliance
description: End-to-end e-discovery, PII auditing, regulatory compliance, and legal review workflows powered by the Arctera compliance archive. Covers the full compliance lifecycle — from first-pass review and custodian collection through regulatory scanning, DSAR processing, and pre-export clearance.
author: Arctera

commands.name: arctera-review
commands.description: First-pass legal and compliance review over the Arctera archive

commands.name: arctera-audit-pii
commands.description: PII audit and sensitive data scrubbing over the Arctera archive

commands.name: arctera-matter
commands.description: Scoped legal matter review — search all archives by matter name, parties, and date range

commands.name: arctera-custodian
commands.description: Pull all archived communications to/from a specific custodian across email, files, and chat

commands.name: arctera-timeline
commands.description: Build a chronological communication timeline around a topic or between parties across all archives

commands.name: arctera-thread
commands.description: Reconstruct a full conversation thread across email, files, and collaboration archives in one view

commands.name: arctera-legal-hold
commands.description: Identify legal hold candidates matching specified matter criteria across all archives

commands.name: arctera-dsar
commands.description: Data Subject Access Request — find all archived data referencing a named individual

commands.name: arctera-gdpr-delete
commands.description: GDPR erasure pre-deletion audit — identify all records for an individual before processing erasure

commands.name: arctera-data-exposure
commands.description: Identify sensitive data sent to external or unexpected recipients across the archive

commands.name: arctera-regulatory
commands.description: Scan for SEC, FINRA, FCA, CFTC and other regulatory red flags across all archives

commands.name: arctera-insider-risk
commands.description: Detect insider trading signals and MNPI-related communications across the archive

commands.name: arctera-fcpa
commands.description: FCPA and anti-bribery compliance scan across all archived communications

commands.name: arctera-conflicts
commands.description: Conflicts of interest detection across all archived communications

commands.name: arctera-aml
commands.description: Anti-money laundering signal scan across the compliance archive

commands.name: arctera-cross-archive
commands.description: Correlate a topic across email, files, and collaboration archives in a unified view

commands.name: arctera-project
commands.description: Pull all communications related to a named deal or project across all archives

commands.name: arctera-attachment-audit
commands.description: Audit attachments by file type, sender, or recipient across the email archive

commands.name: arctera-between
commands.description: Find all communications between two specific people across all archives

commands.name: arctera-external
commands.description: Audit all outbound communications sent to external domains across the archive

commands.name: arctera-channel-audit
commands.description: Audit a specific communication channel (Bloomberg, Teams, Slack, Reuters) for a topic or person

commands.name: arctera-pre-export
commands.description: Pre-export compliance checklist — PII, legal hold, and privilege checks before production

commands.name: arctera-summary
commands.description: Executive summary report across a matter or topic for non-legal stakeholders
